executive_summary: Latest updates from 4 sources covering the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Monitoring 4 key developments. AI analysis refreshing shortly.
execSummaryRich: Escalation: HIGH. Key developments: Largest Iranian missile salvo since beginning of war fired at central Israel. Iran denies Trump’s claim Iranian president requested ceasefire. Israeli army detects another Iran missile attack. Iran War: What a Marine Expeditionary Unit is – and other US military terms. Situation remains active.

key_developments.headline: Largest Iranian missile salvo since beginning of war fired at central Israel
key_developments.detail: Iran has fired some 10 ballistic missiles at central Israel - the largest salvo launched since the early days of the war, according to the Israeli military. key_developments.headline: Iran denies Trump’s claim Iranian president requested ceasefire
key_developments.detail: A senior Iranian official has denied US President Donald Trump’s claim that Iran’s “new regime president” has asked for a ceasefire, as the United States and Israel continue their war on the country . key_developments.headline: Israeli army detects another Iran missile attack
key_developments.detail: Israel's military said it has detected another ballistic missile attack launch from Iran heading towards central Israel. This shortly follows the launch of around 10 missiles at the same area - most of them downed by air defences.
key_developments.fullAnalysis: Israel's military said it has detected another ballistic missile attack launch from Iran heading towards central Israel. This shortly follows the launch of around 10 missiles at the same area - most of them downed by air defences.

terminology_explained.simple_explanation: Iran's elite Revolutionary Guard — controls missiles and drones.
Narrow waterway — 20% of world oil passes through it.

what_to_watch_next: Monitor live feeds for breaking developments.

india_impact.headline: India Monitors Gulf Conflict
india_impact.detail: India's energy security tied to Gulf stability.
india_impact.full_detail: India imports 85% of crude oil from Gulf. Strait of Hormuz disruption would immediately impact supply.

indiaSummary: India continues to monitor the US-Israel-Iran conflict closely given its significant dependence on Gulf energy imports and the large Indian diaspora. Oil price volatility directly impacts petrol prices for Indian consumers.
